member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.Buttons.MudButtonAsyncRx
member.summary: A MudButton that binds to an IObservableCommandAsync with progress and cancellation support.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.Buttons.MudButtonAsyncRx.Command
member.summary: The async observable command to bind to this button.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.Buttons.MudButtonAsyncRx.ConfirmExecutionAsync
member.summary: Optional confirmation function called before execution. Return true to proceed, false to cancel.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.Buttons.MudButtonAsyncRx.CancelText
member.summary: Text to display on the cancel button when the command supports cancellation. If not set, no cancel functionality is shown.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.Buttons.MudButtonAsyncRx.CancelColor
member.summary: Color for the button when in cancel mode.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.Buttons.MudButtonAsyncRx.HasProgress
member.summary: Whether to show a progress spinner during execution.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.Buttons.MudButtonAsyncRxOf`1
member.summary: A MudButton that binds to a parameterized IObservableCommandAsync with progress and cancellation support.

member.summary: The async observable command to bind to this button.

member.summary: The parameter to pass to the command.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.Buttons.MudButtonAsyncRxOf`1.ConfirmExecutionAsync
member.summary: Optional confirmation function called before execution. Return true to proceed, false to cancel.

member.summary: Text to display on the cancel button when the command supports cancellation. If not set, no cancel functionality is shown.

member.summary: Color for the button when in cancel mode.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.Buttons.MudButtonAsyncRxOf`1.HasProgress
member.summary: Whether to show a progress spinner during execution.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.Components.StatusModel
member.summary: Concrete singleton StatusModel for MudBlazor applications. Inherits Messages, status methods, and component triggers from the abstract base.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.Components.Razor.StatusDisplay.Filter
member.summary: Auto-generated filter method for ObservableComponent property filtering. Only properties used in this component trigger re-renders. Property names match the qualified names emitted by Observable streams (ClassName.PropertyName).

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.Components.Razor.StatusDisplay.ErrorDisplayMode
member.summary: How errors are displayed. Default: SNACKBAR_AND_ICON. In SNACKBAR + Aggregate mode: errors accumulate while snackbar is visible, cleared when snackbar closes.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.Components.Razor.StatusDisplay.ErrorMessageMode
member.summary: How errors are accumulated. Default: Aggregate.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.Components.Razor.StatusDisplay.ShowErrorSource
member.summary: Whether to show the source (e.g., command name) in error messages. Default: true.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.Components.Razor.StatusDisplay.MessageDisplayMode
member.summary: How non-error messages are displayed. Default: SNACKBAR. In SNACKBAR + Aggregate mode: messages accumulate while snackbar is visible, cleared when snackbar closes.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.Components.Razor.StatusDisplay.MessageMessageMode
member.summary: How non-error messages are accumulated. Default: Aggregate.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.Components.Razor.StatusDisplay.ShowMessageSource
member.summary: Whether to show the source in non-error messages. Default: true.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.Components.Razor.StatusDisplay.GroupMessagesBySeverity
member.summary: When true, groups non-error messages by severity (Warning first, then Success, then Info) with newest on top within each group. When false, shows all messages strictly by time with newest on top. Default: true.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.Components.Razor.StatusDisplay.SnackbarPositionClass
member.summary: Position of the snackbar. Default: TopEnd.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.Components.Razor.AggregatedMessagesContent.GroupBySeverity
member.summary: When true, groups messages by severity (Warning first, then Success, then Info) with newest on top within each group. When false, shows all messages strictly by time with newest on top.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.Components.Razor.AggregatedMessagesContent.OnClear
member.summary: Callback invoked when the clear all button is clicked.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.ButtonType
member.summary: Specifies the type of button component for rendering logic.

member.name: F:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.ButtonType.DEFAULT
member.summary: Standard button with text content.

member.name: F:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.ButtonType.ICON
member.summary: Icon-only button without text.

member.name: F:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.ButtonType.FAB
member.summary: Floating action button.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.IconVariant
member.summary: Specifies the MudBlazor icon variant style.

member.name: F:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.IconVariant.FILLED
member.summary: Filled icon style.

member.name: F:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.IconVariant.OUTLINED
member.summary: Outlined icon style.

member.name: F:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.IconVariant.ROUNDED
member.summary: Rounded icon style.

member.name: F:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.IconVariant.SHARP
member.summary: Sharp icon style.

member.name: F:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.IconVariant.TWO_TONE
member.summary: Two-tone icon style.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.StatusDisplayMode
member.summary:
Specifies how status messages are displayed.
Valid combinations with StatusMessageMode:
Single + SNACKBAR: Snackbar only, each message replaces previous
Single + ICON: Icon only, each message replaces previous
Single + SNACKBAR_AND_ICON: Both, each message replaces previous
Aggregate + ICON: Icon with badge showing count, messages accumulate until cleared
Aggregate + SNACKBAR_AND_ICON: Both with aggregated display, messages accumulate until cleared
Aggregate + SNACKBAR: Auto-aggregation mode - messages accumulate while snackbar is visible, cleared when snackbar closes

member.name: F:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.StatusDisplayMode.SNACKBAR
member.summary: Display messages via snackbar only. With Aggregate mode: messages accumulate while snackbar is visible and are automatically cleared when snackbar closes (timeout or dismissal).

member.name: F:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.StatusDisplayMode.ICON
member.summary: Display messages via icon with badge only. Click icon to show snackbar. Works with both Single and Aggregate message modes.

member.name: F:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.StatusDisplayMode.SNACKBAR_AND_ICON
member.summary: Display messages via both snackbar and icon with badge. Works with both Single and Aggregate message modes. Messages persist until manually cleared via icon click.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.FabButtons.MudFabAsyncRx
member.summary: A MudFab that binds to an IObservableCommandAsync with progress icon support.

member.summary: Color for the FAB when in cancel mode.

member.summary: Whether to show a progress icon during execution.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.Internal.ButtonRenderHelper
member.summary: Helper class for rendering progress and cancel content in buttons.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.Internal.ButtonRenderHelper.RenderProgress(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.RenderFragment)
member.summary: Renders a progress spinner with optional text content.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.Internal.ButtonRenderHelper.RenderCancel(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.RenderFragment,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Renders cancel content with optional progress spinner and text.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.Internal.IconExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for resolving MudBlazor icons based on the selected icon variant.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.Internal.IconExtensions.GetCancelIcon(System.Nullable{RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.IconVariant})
member.summary: Returns the cancel icon matching the specified variant style.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.Internal.IconExtensions.GetProgressIcon(System.Nullable{RxBlazorV2.MudBlazor.IconVariant})
member.summary: Returns the progress/refresh icon matching the specified variant style.
